info.title: XOGO Backend API - V2
info.description: Current stable API version. Provides full access to XOGO digital signage platform features including player management, content library, playlists, and user administration.

id.description: Unique ID of the library item.

notes.description: Additional notes of the library item.

tags.description: Associated tags of the library item.

libraryItemType.description: Type of the library item. Possible Values : Image,Video,HtmlApp

thumbnailUrl.description: Thumbnail URL of the library item.

order.description: Order of the item in the playlist.

isVisible.description: Boolean field indicating whether playlist item is visible or not.

thumbnailUrl.description: Thumbnail url of the player photo.

offlineCachingEnabled.description: Boolean field indicating whether offline caching is enabled on player or not.

scheduledDownloadEnabled.description: Boolean field indicating whether scheduled download is enabled on player or not.

relatedPlaylistHash.description: Computed hash for related playlist. You can compare hashes in order to detech playlist changes.

iotHubAccessKey.description: IoT Hub access key can be used to send telemetry and associate realtime connections.

isPlaybackSyncEnabled.description: Boolean field indicating whether playback sync over local network is enabled on player.

lastOnlineDate.description: Last online date for the player.

necDevices.description: NEC screens connected to the player.

isAnalyticsEnabled.description: Boolean field indicating whether analytics is enabled on player or not.

companyId.description: Unique ID of the company player belongs to.

playerToken.description: Player authentication token. This token can be used for player spesific operations.

hasDeadZone.x-deprecatedMessage: HasDeadZone is now calculated server-side. Client-provided values are ignored.

api-key.description: API Access Key for general API access. Required for most endpoints. Header format: `X-API-KEY: {your-api-key}`
api-key.name: X-API-KEY

api-version.description: API Version header for specifying the desired API version. Header format: `X-API-VERSION: {version}`
api-version.name: X-API-VERSION

player-key.description: Player authentication token for player device operations. Obtained during player registration. Header format: `X-PLAYER-KEY: {player-token}`
player-key.name: X-PLAYER-KEY

manager-key.description: Manager authentication token for administrative operations. Obtained after successful user login. Header format: `X-MANAGER-KEY: {manager-token}`
manager-key.name: X-MANAGER-KEY
